context: Approval rules, on-call mapping, event catalog, rollback strategy, temporal controls, and validation guidance.

sections.content: Approval rules, on-call mapping, event catalog, rollback strategy, temporal controls, and validation guidance. This module covers Approval rules, On-call routing, Event catalog, Rollback strategy, Temporal controls. High risk releases require engineering lead approval and support lead acknowledgement. Human docs cannot change alone when sync_source is agent-primary. No release may enter scheduled outside the declared rollout window. sev1 pages primary and secondary on-call within five minutes. sev2 pages primary on-call and support lead within fifteen minutes. sev3 creates a queued task for business-hours triage. release.packet.approved is emitted by workflow-engine and consumed by release-service and analytics-worker. release.packet.published is emitted by release-service and consumed by notification-service. incident.created is emitted by release-service when rollout health degrades. Webhook delivery failures retry three times with exponential backoff before escalation. Primary database write failures abort publish and escalate to platform-oncall. Negative rollout health triggers compensate by executing the rollback plan. Rollout window is a UTC deadline window from 09:00 to 10:00. Canary health is evaluated every five minutes. Publish status must reach notification-service within sixty seconds.

artifacts.usage: Release approval and paired-surface governance policy.

rules.action: High risk releases require engineering lead approval and support lead acknowledgement.

rules.condition: surface_pair.sync_source == 'agent-primary' AND human.changed == true AND agent.changed == false
rules.action: Human docs cannot change alone when sync_source is agent-primary.
No release may enter scheduled outside the declared rollout window.

rows: sev1 pages primary and secondary on-call within five minutes.
sev2 pages primary on-call and support lead within fifteen minutes.
sev3 creates a queued task for business-hours triage.

events.name: release.packet.approved
events.desc: release.packet.approved is emitted by workflow-engine and consumed by release-service and analytics-worker.

events.name: release.packet.published

events.desc: incident.created is emitted by release-service when rollout health degrades.

artifacts.usage: Failure-handling plan for publish and rollback paths.

fallback_chain: Webhook delivery failures retry three times with exponential backoff before escalation.
Primary database write failures abort publish and escalate to platform-oncall.
Negative rollout health triggers compensate by executing the rollback plan.
